summary: Iteration 41: Phase 5E Clinical-Level Comparison Guardrails testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Fixed bug where product card system_type and implant_class were not Title Case formatted. All frontend tests passed - comparison page shows confidence badge, product detail 'Compare with Similar' button works, all existing pages functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5E Clinical-Level Comparison Guardrails fully working. Key test pairs: armar-titanium-plates + 2.4mm-lps-distal-radial-volar-buttress-plate (pass, same plates), 2.4mm-lps-distal-radial-volar-buttress-plate + mboss-screw-system (block, plate vs screw), albumin-reagent + alat-(gpt)-reagent (pass, same reagents), albumin-reagent + hiv-1-2-rapid-test-kit (block, reagent vs rapid test). Response includes comparison_basis, comparison_confidence, comparison_guardrail_reason. Title Case formatting applied to system_type and implant_class in both comparison rows and product cards.

clinical_level_guardrails.Plate vs Screw comparison blocked: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Cannot compare different clinical classes'
clinical_level_guardrails.Cross-division comparison blocked: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Cannot compare products from different divisions'
clinical_level_guardrails.Reagent vs Rapid Test comparison blocked: PASS - Returns 400 with clinical class error

new_response_fields.comparison_guardrail_reason field presen: PASS - Contains explanation like 'Same implant class: plates'

title_case_formatting.Product card system_type: PASS - Fixed bug, now returns 'Plate System'

suggestions_endpoint.Suggestions have comparison_reason: PASS - All suggestions include reason field

frontend_comparison_page.Confidence badge displayed: PASS - Shows 'HIGH CONFIDENCE' badge in green
frontend_comparison_page.Guardrail reason displayed: PASS - Shows 'Same implant class: plates + Related brand systems: coated variant'
frontend_comparison_page.Comparison table with 13 rows: PASS - Division, Category, Brand System, Material, Coating, System Type, Implant Class, etc.
frontend_comparison_page.Amber highlighting on differences: PASS - Brand System, Coating, Available Variants highlighted

frontend_product_detail.Same Family Alternatives section: PASS - Shows related products with 'Coated Variant Available' badges

bug_fixed.issue: Product card system_type and implant_class were returning snake_case values (e.g., 'plate_system') instead of Title Case (e.g., 'Plate System')
bug_fixed.fix: Applied _format_value() function to system_type and implant_class fields in _comparison_card() function
